creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Am 25.02.10 20:50, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of devel/libvanessa_socket,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/144297 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144297
> 
Looks ok. Thanks for the patch. Go a head. It's devel/libvanessa_logger
instead of devel/libvanessa_socket

Regards,
Thomas
